_note: Vercel does not support long-running Python worker processes natively.
• Frontend (React / Next.js dashboard) deployed on Vercel
This vercel.json rewrites /api/* to your Render backend URL.
Set RENDER_API_URL in Vercel's environment variables dashboard.

_alternatively_for_nextjs.note: If your frontend is Next.js, change framework to 'nextjs' above and remove the rewrites block. Use Next.js API routes as a thin proxy instead.
